title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
description: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

title: Contrastive Reflection for Iterative Prompt Optimization
description:

title: Investigating Multi-Agent Deliberation in Law
description:
arXiv:2606.30906v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Artificial Intelligence is increasingly applied to the field of law, and has the potential to increase access to justice. One particular movement that is gaining traction is that of agentic AI, wherein AI agents, based on Large Language Models (LLMs)

title: Why Solve It Twice? Hierarchical Accumulation of Skills for Transfer-Efficient ML Engineering
description:
arXiv:2606.30911v1 Announce Type: new

title: RoPoLL: Robust Panel of LLM Judges
description:
arXiv:2606.30931v1 Announce Type: new

title: AgRefactor: Self-Evolving Agentic Workflow for HLS Compatibility and Performance
description:
arXiv:2606.30949v1 Announce Type: new
